compatible_maskfactory_tests.command: python -m pytest -q <all maskfactory QA test modules>

verified_behavior: Authority state, issuer kind, claim class, and access mode remain exact frozen vocabularies.
Access mode, authority state, legacy strings, live QA controls, and optional accuracy profiles cannot independently authorize promotion.
Operational certificates never become training gold or independent accuracy truth.
Production certificate verification requires non-fixture context and the frozen semantic-core trust checks.
Promotion decisions recompute every unique signed policy criterion and derive criterion status from observations.
Fixture decisions remain diagnostic_only and cannot become eligible for production use.
Invalidations bind exact target, hash, scope, predecessor authority, and predecessor certificate state.
Invalidation writes a tombstone, is idempotent on replay, cannot elevate authority, and preserves unrelated targets and branches.
